description: Extension activates when a workspace is opened in VSCode
steps: Open VSCode with a workspace folder
Verify the extension activates without errors
Check the Output panel shows no activation errors
Verify all commands declared in package.json contributes.commands are registered

description: Extension deactivates cleanly and releases all disposables
steps: Activate the extension
Disable or uninstall the extension
Verify deactivate() is called without errors
Verify no memory leaks — all context.subscriptions items are disposed

description: Extension can be packaged as a .vsix file
steps: Run npm run package
Verify dist/extension.js is generated
Verify a .vsix file is created in the project root
Install the .vsix in VSCode via 'Install from VSIX'
Verify the extension works after installation

description: Main panel opens when the extension's primary command is executed
steps: Open the command palette (Ctrl+Shift+P)
Execute the extension's main open command
Verify a WebviewPanel opens
Verify the panel title is correct
Verify the panel renders without errors

description: User can input project requirement data through the main panel form
steps: Open the main WebviewPanel
Locate the input form area
Type project requirement text into the input field
Verify the typed content is displayed in the field
Verify the input value is retained when the panel regains focus

description: User input data is converted to Markdown format for agent consumption
steps: Enter structured project requirement data in the input form
Trigger the Markdown conversion action
Verify MarkdownConverter produces valid Markdown output
Verify the converted Markdown is displayed or made available to the next step
Verify no data is lost during conversion

description: Init Project button triggers project initialization via the configured CLI agent
steps: Open the main WebviewPanel
Click the 'Init Project' button
Verify InitService loads the built-in init prompt (no external file dependency)
Verify AgentRunnerFactory creates the correct IAgentRunner based on current AgentConfig
Verify the CLI agent process is spawned with the init prompt
Verify .claude/ directory and required harness files are created in the workspace
Verify a success message and list of created files are shown in the UI

description: AnalyzerService generates a Command markdown file at .claude/commands/
steps: Provide Markdown-formatted input describing a custom command
Trigger the Analyzer action
Verify AnalyzerService calls the configured CLI agent (sub-agent mode)
Verify a new .md file is created under .claude/commands/
Verify the file contains the command name, description, and task steps

description: AnalyzerService generates a Skill markdown file
steps: Provide Markdown-formatted input describing a skill
Trigger the Analyzer action
Verify a new skill .md file is created in the appropriate directory
Verify the file contains the skill trigger conditions and behavior description

description: AnalyzerService generates an MCP server spec file
steps: Provide Markdown-formatted input describing an MCP server requirement
Trigger the Analyzer action
Verify a MCP spec file (.json or .md) is created
Verify the spec file contains the server name and configuration fields

description: AnalyzerService generates a hook configuration entry
steps: Provide Markdown-formatted input describing a hook (e.g. pre-tool-use)
Trigger the Analyzer action
Verify the hook configuration is written to .claude/settings.json or a dedicated file
Verify the hook entry contains the correct event name and shell command

description: AnalyzerService generates a sub-agent markdown file at .claude/agents/
steps: Provide Markdown-formatted input describing a sub-agent role
Trigger the Analyzer action
Verify a new .md file is created under .claude/agents/<agent-name>/
Verify the file contains the agent description, tools, and behavior rules

description: Plan view renders the current PLAN.md content as a readable stepped list
steps: Ensure .claude/plans/PLAN.md exists with at least one plan section
Open or navigate to the Plan view in the extension
Verify PlanService reads PLAN.md
Verify the plan steps are rendered as a numbered or checkable list
Verify completed steps (checked) are visually distinct from pending steps

description: User can select the CLI agent type (Claude Code, Gemini, Custom) in settings
steps: Open the Agent Settings view in the extension
Locate the agent type selector (dropdown or radio group)
Select 'Claude Code'
Verify the selection is saved to AgentConfig
Select 'Gemini'
Verify the selection is saved to AgentConfig
Select 'Custom'
Verify the selection is saved to AgentConfig

description: User can set the CLI executable path in agent settings
steps: Open the Agent Settings view
Locate the CLI path input field
Enter a custom path (e.g. /usr/local/bin/claude)
Save settings
Verify the path is persisted via vscode.workspace.getConfiguration or JSON
Reload the panel and verify the saved path is pre-filled

description: User can set extra CLI flags in agent settings
steps: Open the Agent Settings view
Locate the extra arguments input field
Enter additional flags (e.g. --verbose --model claude-opus-4-6)
Save settings
Trigger an agent action
Verify the extra flags are appended to the child_process.spawn args array

description: AgentRunnerFactory returns ClaudeCodeRunner when agentType is 'claude'
steps: Set agentType to 'claude' in AgentConfig
Call AgentRunnerFactory.create(config)
Verify the returned object is an instance of ClaudeCodeRunner
Invoke the runner with a test prompt
Verify child_process.spawn is called with 'claude' as the command

description: AgentRunnerFactory returns GeminiCliRunner when agentType is 'gemini'
steps: Set agentType to 'gemini' in AgentConfig
Call AgentRunnerFactory.create(config)
Verify the returned object is an instance of GeminiCliRunner
Invoke the runner with a test prompt
Verify child_process.spawn is called with 'gemini' as the command

description: AgentRunnerFactory returns CustomCliRunner when agentType is 'custom'
steps: Set agentType to 'custom' and cliPath to a custom executable in AgentConfig
Call AgentRunnerFactory.create(config)
Verify the returned object is an instance of CustomCliRunner
Invoke the runner with a test prompt
Verify child_process.spawn is called with the user-specified cliPath

description: CLI agent stdout and stderr output is streamed and displayed in the UI
steps: Trigger any action that invokes IAgentRunner
Verify the spawned process stdout is captured in real time
Verify the output is forwarded to the WebviewPanel output area
Verify stderr messages are shown with a distinct error style
Verify the output area scrolls to the latest line automatically

description: FileManager creates a new .md file at a specified path
steps: Call FileManager.create(path, content) with a target path and Markdown string
Verify the file is created at the specified path
Verify the file content matches the input string
Verify an error is thrown if the parent directory does not exist

description: FileManager reads a .md file from a specified path
steps: Create a test .md file at a known path
Call FileManager.read(path)
Verify the returned string matches the file content
Verify an error is thrown if the file does not exist

description: FileManager updates (overwrites) a .md file at a specified path
steps: Create a test .md file with initial content
Call FileManager.update(path, newContent)
Verify the file now contains newContent
Verify the original content is fully replaced

description: FileManager deletes a .md file at a specified path
steps: Create a test .md file
Call FileManager.delete(path)
Verify the file no longer exists on the filesystem
Verify an error is thrown if the file does not exist

description: FileManager lists all .md files in a specified directory
steps: Create multiple .md files in a test directory
Call FileManager.list(directoryPath)
Verify all .md file paths are returned
Verify non-.md files are excluded from the result
Verify an empty array is returned for a directory with no .md files

description: UI displays the list of files created or modified after an agent action completes
steps: Trigger an agent action (e.g. Init or Analyzer)
Wait for the CLI agent process to exit
Verify FileManager.list() is called on the relevant .claude/ subdirectory
Verify the result file list is rendered in the WebviewPanel
Verify each file entry is clickable and opens the file in the VSCode editor

description: Agent settings are persisted across VSCode sessions
steps: Set agentType, cliPath, and extraArgs in the Agent Settings view
Close and reopen VSCode
Open the Agent Settings view again
Verify all three settings are pre-populated with the previously saved values

description: TypeScript compilation passes with no type errors
steps: Run npm run check-types
Verify the command exits with code 0
Verify no TypeScript errors are printed to stdout or stderr

description: ESLint passes with no lint errors on the src/ directory
steps: Run npm run lint
Verify the command exits with code 0
Verify no ESLint errors or warnings are printed

description: esbuild가 src/extension.ts를 dist/extension.js로 오류 없이 번들링한다
steps: npm run compile 명령을 실행한다
명령이 종료 코드 0으로 완료되는지 확인한다
dist/extension.js 파일이 생성되었는지 확인한다
생성된 dist/extension.js가 CJS 포맷이며 vscode 모듈이 번들에 포함되지 않았는지 확인한다
콘솔에 번들링 에러가 없는지 확인한다

description: npm test (Mocha + @vscode/test-cli)가 오류 없이 통과된다
steps: npm test 명령을 실행한다
VSCode Extension Host 환경이 실행되는지 확인한다
src/test/ 하위의 모든 테스트 파일이 실행되는지 확인한다
모든 테스트가 통과하는지 확인한다
테스트 실패 시 에러 메시지와 스택 트레이스가 출력되는지 확인한다

description: 이미 열린 메인 패널이 있을 때 명령을 재실행하면 새 패널이 열리지 않고 기존 패널이 포커스된다
steps: Extension의 메인 열기 명령을 실행하여 WebviewPanel을 연다
다른 편집기 탭을 클릭하여 패널에서 포커스를 이동한다
동일한 열기 명령을 다시 실행한다
새로운 패널이 생성되지 않고 기존 패널이 활성화되는지 확인한다
패널이 이전에 표시한 콘텐츠를 유지하는지 확인한다

description: 에이전트 CLI 프로세스가 오류 코드로 종료되면 UI에 오류 메시지와 종료 코드가 표시된다
steps: Agent Settings에서 존재하지 않는 CLI 경로를 설정한다
Init 또는 Analyzer 액션을 실행한다
CLI 프로세스가 오류 코드(0이 아닌 값)로 종료되는지 확인한다
WebviewPanel에 오류 메시지와 종료 코드가 표시되는지 확인한다
성공 메시지나 파일 목록이 표시되지 않는지 확인한다
콘솔 Output 패널에도 오류 내용이 기록되는지 확인한다

description: 사용자가 UI에서 실행 중인 에이전트 프로세스를 취소할 수 있다
steps: Init 또는 Analyzer 액션을 실행하여 에이전트 프로세스를 시작한다
프로세스가 실행 중인 동안 UI에 '취소' 버튼이 표시되는지 확인한다
'취소' 버튼을 클릭한다
child_process가 종료되는지 확인한다
UI에 취소 완료 메시지가 표시되는지 확인한다
취소 후 '취소' 버튼이 사라지고 UI가 초기 상태로 돌아오는지 확인한다
